characters.appearance: A young man in his early 20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. He has thick, curly dark hair.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Tell me about yourself.
Character B says: Sir... can I answer in Hindi? I freeze when I have to speak English.
Character A says: You studied in English medium for 12 years, right?
Character B says: Yes, sir.
Character A says: See, you learned your mother tongue by actually speaking it, not by reading grammar books. English works exactly the same way. You just need a safe space to practice speaking out loud.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks viewer with high-stakes job interview scenario.
- Names English immediately and introduces the mother-tongue reframe (beat f).
- Highlights the failure of old methods (beat d).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Interviews going like this?
Tell me about yourself.
Sir... can I answer in Hindi?
I freeze when I have to speak English.
Studied in English medium for 12 years?
You learned your mother tongue
by actually speaking it.
English works exactly the same way.
You just need a safe space to speak.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: That's why I always recommend the Supernova app. It has a personal AI teacher named Miss Nova.
Character A says: She doesn't just give you generic lessons. She analyzes your exact level and builds a personalized plan just for you.
Character A says: You practice speaking in real-life scenarios, like client calls or interviews.
Character A says: And the best part? You can make 1000 mistakes at 3 a.m. She corrects you in your own language, with zero judgment.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova and Miss Nova as the solution.
- Delivers core retention beats: personalization (beat a) and privacy/no-judgment (beat b).
- Reframes the visual cutaways as practicing real-life scenarios (beat e) and getting logic explained in your language (beat g).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Try the Supernova app.
Personal AI teacher: Miss Nova.
Builds a personalized plan just for you.
Practice real-life scenarios.
Make 1000 mistakes at 3 a.m.
Corrects you in your own language.
Zero judgment.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: But how can an AI teach me better than a human?
Character A says: ChatGPT is just an assistant, but Miss Nova is a real teacher. Plus, over 1 crore Indians are already using it. Stop wasting hours on grammar PDFs. Just 15 minutes a day.
Character B says: Okay, I will install Supernova and start speaking today.
Character A says: Perfect.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Handles the AI skepticism objection with the ChatGPT contrast.
- Provides approved social proof (1 crore+ users).
- Closes with negative/positive time anchors and a clean install CTA.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
How can AI teach me?
ChatGPT is an assistant.
Miss Nova is a teacher.
1 Crore+ users in India.
Stop wasting hours on PDFs.
Just 15 minutes a day.
Install Supernova and start speaking today.
Perfect.
